title: Diffusion Models explained..
summary: Caleb Writes Code and Julia Turc explain diffusion models as a process and framework rather than a fixed architecture. They cover how diffusion can be implemented with transformers such as DiT, discuss strengths and weaknesses, and explore the theoretical foundations and progression of the technique.
